briefingTopic: What are the most talked about movies on social media
method: Primary-source only. Every item links to a source URL. Quotes are verbatim.

topThingsFilmTwitterFollowing.verbatim: Emerald Fennell’s steamy Margot Robbie/Jacob Elordi adaptation: By far the biggest topic. Heavy debates on its style (visuals, carnality, changes from the book), “sexier than expected” memes/screencaps, purist criticism (“erased key scenes,” “fanfic slop”), repeat-viewing praise, and box office resilience. It splits literary/romance fans from general audiences.
Sony Animation family sports comedy: Animation and family-film corners celebrating its box office upset (#1 US weekend, strong legs). “Peak” viewer reactions and character appreciation.
Imminent Feb 27 release: Horror community overlap—hype for legacy cast/return to form vs. boycott calls (tied to past casting drama). Salary news and early screening buzz spread fast.

viralPosts.verbatim: It’s very interesting seeing people clutching their pearls about the new Wuthering Heights movie and writing essays about racism and class themes being erased... as if this isn’t a fanfic
viralPosts.engagementNote: Low direct likes but sparked quote chains/debates
